epic.title: EVA Automation Control Plane
epic.description:
Runtime layer that executes on top of the 37-data-model catalog.

Records WHAT HAPPENED: runs, step executions, evidence packs, and the evidence_id that ties a PR → deployment → telemetry snapshot together.

evidence_id format: GH{run}-PR{pr}-{short_sha}

Two planes: catalog (37-data-model, port 8010) + runtime (40-eva-control-plane, port 8020).

features.title: Runtime API — FastAPI (port 8020)
features.description: 8 REST routes: GET/POST/PATCH /runs, GET/POST /artifacts, GET /evidence/{evidence_id}, GET /health. Pydantic v2 models (Run, StepRun, Artifact). Swagger at /docs.

features.title: Two-Plane Evidence Spine
features.description: evidence_id format GH{run_number}-PR{pr_number}-{short_sha} propagated across: PR check run title, Azure deployment tag, ADO work item artifact, Cosmos run partition key. Cross-plane evidence view via GET /evidence/{evidence_id}.

features.title: GitHub Actions Runbooks (RB-001, RB-002)
features.description: RB-001: PR → Build/Test → Evidence Pack (ACTIVE). RB-002: Promote to DEV (stub). Compiled from runbook catalog in 37-data-model. pack-evidence.py assembles evidence-pack.json and uploads as GitHub artifact.

features.title: Control-Plane Data Models and Seeds
features.description: Pydantic v2 models: Run (run_id, evidence_id, status, app_id), StepRun (step_id, runbook_id, duration_s), Artifact (sha256, uri, artifact_type). JSON seed files for model/, config.py pydantic-settings.

user_stories.title: FastAPI Runtime API — 8 routes, Swagger at /docs
user_stories.description: Implement FastAPI server on port 8020 with routers: runs.py (CRUD), artifacts.py (CRUD), evidence.py (cross-run view). Health endpoint. Auto-generated Swagger. All routes accept/return Pydantic v2 models.
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: GET /health returns 200. POST /runs returns run_id + evidence_id. GET /evidence/{id} returns run + steps + artifacts. Swagger accessible at /docs.

user_stories.title: Evidence Spine — evidence_id propagation across planes
user_stories.description: Define and enforce evidence_id format GH{run}-PR{pr}-{sha}. Propagate via PR check title, Azure deploy tag, ADO comment, Cosmos partition key. Document two-plane architecture (catalog vs runtime).
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: evidence_id follows GH{run}-PR{pr}-{sha} format. GET /evidence/{id} returns all correlated records. Format documented in README.

user_stories.title: RB-001 — PR CI Evidence Workflow (GitHub Actions)
user_stories.description: Active GitHub Actions workflow: on PR open/sync → checkout → build/test → pack-evidence.py → upload evidence-pack.json as artifact → set check status. Propagates evidence_id in check title.
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: Workflow triggers on PR. evidence-pack.json uploaded as GitHub artifact. Check run title contains evidence_id. pack-evidence.py assembles run + steps + artifact refs.

user_stories.title: RB-002 — Promote to DEV Workflow (stub)
user_stories.description: Stub GitHub Actions workflow for DEV promotion. Accepts evidence_id as input. Logs promotion intent and sets output evidence_id. Wired for AzureClient.deploy() once implemented in 41-eva-cli.
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: Workflow file exists at .github/workflows/rb-002-promote-dev.yml. Accepts evidence_id input. Outputs evidence_id. Runbook entry exists in 37-data-model catalog.

user_stories.title: Pydantic v2 Models — Run, StepRun, Artifact
user_stories.description: Define Pydantic v2 models: Run (run_id, evidence_id, status, runbook_id, app_id, env, timestamps), StepRun (step_id, run_id, step_name, status, duration_s), Artifact (artifact_id, run_id, sha256, uri, artifact_type). JSON seed files.
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: All models validate with Pydantic v2. JSON seeds loadable without errors. model/runs.json, step_runs.json, artifacts.json present.

user_stories.title: pack-evidence.py — Evidence Pack Assembler
user_stories.description: Script called from GitHub Actions (RB-001) to assemble evidence-pack.json: collects run metadata, step results, artifact URIs + SHA-256 hashes, summary (passed/failed/coverage). Uploads as GitHub artifact named evidence-pack.
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: evidence-pack.json schema: evidence_id, schema_version, generated_at, runbook_id, app_id, pr_number, commit_sha, summary, artifacts[]. SHA-256 computed for each artifact.
